title: Prism Pulse
prompt: Instrumental only. A polished 42-second nocturnal minimal electronica focus track at 108 BPM. Build a clear, tactile groove from a compact punchy kick, a short muted rim hit, syncopated tom-like percussion, an elastic mono-synth bass pulse, glassy analog chord stabs, and a thin granular shimmer. The rhythm should be confident and forward-moving but leave large pockets of silence; it should feel like colored light orbiting a dark energy core. Structure: 0–7 seconds sparse signal, 7–28 seconds locked groove, 28–35 seconds a subtle harmonic lift, 35–42 seconds a clean restrained release. No vocals, no lo-fi, no Rhodes, no acoustic piano, no vinyl crackle, no jazz harmony, no EDM riser, no big drop, no aggressive sidechain pump, no festival snare, no harsh highs.
commercialUseNote: Verify the active ElevenLabs paid-plan music terms before commercial publication.
